```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  don't start from a blank page
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;opacity:0.18;position:absolute;top:0.1em;right:0.3em;">1</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">do</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.3em;line-height:1.2;">By hand once</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Get it right.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;opacity:0.18;position:absolute;top:0.1em;right:0.3em;">2</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">extract</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.3em;line-height:1.2;">Ask Claude</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">"Turn this into <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;">SKILL.md</code>."</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;opacity:0.18;position:absolute;top:0.1em;right:0.3em;">3</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">drop in</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.3em;line-height:1.2;">Save &amp; test</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Try on next task.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;opacity:0.18;position:absolute;top:0.1em;right:0.3em;">4</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">refine</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.3em;line-height:1.2;">Update over time</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Misfires → Gotchas.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);border-radius:10px;padding:0.6em 1em;text-align:center;font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">
  Complete a real run first. <strong style="color:#5654A2;">Then</strong> extract the rule.
 </div>

</div>
```
